holdings.infoBox: UTSL is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 32.61%, NextEra Energy at 7.83%, Utilities Select Sector Index Swap at 4.83%, The Southern Company at 4.52%, and Duke Energy at 4.25%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Utilities Bull 3X ETF (UTSL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Utilities Select Sector index. The fund provides daily 3x exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of utility companies in the US. UTSL was launched on May 3, 2017 and is issued by Direxion.
